calibration.target_achievement_reason: Selected a benign-only conformal self-gap threshold whose full pure-NSA benign FPR stays within target.

fusion_calibration.reason: Weighted fusion is disabled; active NSA decision uses v_detector_match OR self_distance > threshold.

score_calibration.decision_rule: confidence normalization only; labels use sklearn predict

metric_explanations.tp: True Positives: attack flows correctly flagged as anomalies.
metric_explanations.tn: True Negatives: benign flows correctly passed as normal.
metric_explanations.fp: False Positives: benign flows incorrectly flagged as anomalies.
metric_explanations.fn: False Negatives: attack flows missed as normal.
metric_explanations.recall: Recall / Detection Rate / TPR: percentage of real attacks caught. Main IDS metric.
metric_explanations.false_negative_rate: FNR: percentage of real attacks missed. Lower is better.
metric_explanations.false_positive_rate: FPR: percentage of benign flows incorrectly alerted. Lower is better.
metric_explanations.precision: Precision: percentage of alerts that are true attacks.
metric_explanations.f1: F1-score: harmonic mean of precision and recall.
metric_explanations.accuracy: Accuracy: overall correctness, reported as secondary because IDS datasets are imbalanced.
metric_explanations.silhouette_score: Silhouette Score: unsupervised separation of predicted normal/anomaly groups in PCA space. It does not prove attack-detection correctness.
metric_explanations.self_intrusion_rate: Self Intrusion Rate: benign validation samples incorrectly flagged by NSA. AIS autoimmunity check; lower is better.

nsa_eval.training_metric_note: Benign-only training validation has no attack class; precision, recall, F1, TPR, and FNR are intentionally not reported here.

silhouette.reason: Computed from PCA-space features and predicted normal/anomaly groups; interpret as separation only, not labelled correctness.

training_warnings: Only 120 BENIGN rows found; use at least 1,000 for more stable unsupervised calibration.
Calibration/test splits are small (30/30); 200+ rows each is recommended.
NSA calibration reliability is experimental because fewer than 200 benign calibration rows were available.
Raw self-boundary calibration reliability is experimental because the benign calibration sample is small.
PCA self-boundary calibration reliability is experimental because the benign calibration sample is small.
Isolation Forest calibration reliability is experimental because the benign calibration sample is small.

unsupervised_note: Labels are used only to select BENIGN self rows and for reporting. No attack labels are used to fit PCA/scaler, train detectors, train self-boundary, or tune thresholds. The final AIS decision is a pure NSA rule: mature V-detector match OR calibrated self-gap. Self-boundary models are retained only for alert evidence.
